title: NeuroKit2: The Python Toolbox for Neurophysiological Signal Processing
description: NeuroKit2 is a user-friendly, accessible Python toolbox for neurophysiological signal processing. It provides a comprehensive suite of tools for processing signals from various modalities, including electrocardiography (ECG), electrodermal activity (EDA), electromyography (EMG), photoplethysmography (PPG), electroencephalography (EEG), and more.

creators.name: de la Serna Tuya, Juan Moisés

notes: Compiled from publicly available secondary sources. Author ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8401-8018
